regions.text: Sometimes we see it like this. This is a new moon.
This is a new hat. This is an old hat.
And sometimes we see it like this. This is a full moon.
This glass is full. This glass is not full.
These are the changes of the moon. Full, three-quarters, half, a quarter, new. But at all times we see the same side of the moon.
Change? What is that? Here is a change in the direction of this line. And here is another change.
